creator: johan@double-l.nl
text:
When using the live cd i can not label disk with gmirror
it errors out with the following:
gmirror  unknown command : label

Usage :gmirror help
                gmirror list
                gmirror status
                gmirror load
                gmirror unload

The way i used to use this option from the live cd is as follows.

boot with livecd 
chroot /dist
mount -t devfs devfs /dev
gmirror label -v -b gm0 /dev/ad4
( then the error come)
gmirror  unknown command : label

Usage :gmirror help
                gmirror list
                gmirror status
                gmirror load
                gmirror unload

it used to work on on previous versions from 5.3 to 5.5 and 6.0 to 6.3
and even on 7.0 Beta 4 

regards,
Johan Hendriks

How-To-Repeat: see above
